summary: Iteration 2 testing complete - Frontend refactor to data-driven architecture verified. All backend APIs (26/26 tests) pass. New Registry page (/registry and /members alias) fully functional with table layout, search, and filters. All existing pages (Landing, Clans, Alliances, Systems) work correctly after refactor. Apply dialog submits successfully to POST /api/alliances/apply.
critical_code_review_comments: Data-driven architecture properly implemented - all data comes from /src/data/ directory
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
Registry page uses TABLE layout as required with correct columns (Empire ID, Username, Clan, Role, Status)
Filters (search, clan, status) work correctly with empty state when no matches
Old /src/data.js removed and all imports now go through /src/data/ aggregator
seed_data_creation: Test applications created with TEST_ prefix during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 2 verified frontend refactor to data-driven architecture. New Registry page at /registry (with /members alias) shows member table with placeholder data (YZ-001 ExampleUser SNU Member Active). Stats cards show Total Registered=1, Active=1, Divisions Represented=1. Search and filter dropdowns work correctly. All existing pages (Landing with 5 clan cards + Excalibur + philosophy, Clans with 5 cards, Alliances with Excalibur + 3-column system + Apply CTA, Systems with Economy/Governance/Alliances) work correctly. Apply dialog submits to POST /api/alliances/apply and shows success. Navbar includes Registry link. No console errors.

backend: GET /api/overview - core_divisions [SNU, ANO, ONF, ONA, KASAII] (PASS)

frontend: Registry stats cards: Total Registered=1, Active=1, Divisions Represented=1 (PASS)
Registry TABLE with columns: Empire ID, Username, Clan, Role, Status (PASS)
Member row data-testid='member-row-YZ-001' shows YZ-001 / ExampleUser / SNU / Member / Active (PASS)
Registry search input data-testid='registry-search' filters rows (PASS)
Registry empty state shown when filters return nothing (PASS)
Landing page: hero, stats bar, 5 clan cards, Excalibur, philosophy (PASS)
Alliances page: Excalibur card, 3-column system, Apply CTA (PASS)
Systems page: Economy, Governance, Alliances sections (PASS)
Apply dialog opens, form submission works, success message shown (PASS)
